prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent a model/dataset consistency or predictive claim unless exact model, dataset, mapping, signal, parameter, time, scenario, physical-envelope, and claim-scope obligations pass the native evaluator.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current raw dataset rows, fields, cases, timestamps, and hashes
Current required variables, parameters, blocks, units, and assumptions
Current signal/parameter mappings, role matrix, exclusions, and critical targets
Current sampling, scenario, residual, envelope, split, and threshold plan
Current stateful rollout, initial state, horizon, and disjoint holdout identities

prevented_failure_classes.title: Validation identity is wrong
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the model, dataset, plan, mapping, split, or receipt identity is missing, stale, or mismatched
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: The named target-native PhysicsGuard fixture and assertion prove only this bounded semantic failure and do not prove every future physical operating point.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: Native semantic detection is limited to tests/test_validation_depth_receipts.py::test_changed_dataset_content_makes_receipt_stale and its asserted observation 'dataset_identity_stale'.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Coverage universe is shallow
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: signals, parameters, timepoints, events, scenarios, or families are missing or inadequately sampled
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: The named target-native PhysicsGuard fixture and assertion prove only this bounded semantic failure and do not prove every future physical operating point.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: Native semantic detection is limited to tests/test_validation_adequacy.py::test_10000_signals_with_only_two_selected_are_blocked and its asserted observation 'signal_coverage_ratio_not_met'.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Physical relation or envelope is violated
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: native residual, unit, sign, balance, constitutive, or physical-envelope checks fail
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: The named target-native PhysicsGuard fixture and assertion prove only this bounded semantic failure and do not prove every future physical operating point.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: Native semantic detection is limited to tests/test_model_dataset_validation.py::test_conservative_calibration_does_not_turn_direct_failure_into_pass and its asserted observation 'direct_validation_audit_failed'.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Prediction semantics are overclaimed
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: pointwise evidence or a stale/partial rollout is used to authorize prediction
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: The named target-native PhysicsGuard fixture and assertion prove only this bounded semantic failure and do not prove every future physical operating point.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: Native semantic detection is limited to tests/test_predictive_rollout_validation.py::test_pointwise_prediction_is_forbidden and its asserted observation 'pointwise_prediction_forbidden'.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Validation scope is overreached
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the requested claim exceeds the native receipt's covered scope
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: The named target-native PhysicsGuard fixture and assertion prove only this bounded semantic failure and do not prove every future physical operating point.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: Native semantic detection is limited to tests/test_validation_adequacy.py::test_snapshot_receipt_cannot_satisfy_validation_ready_closure and its asserted observation 'snapshot_scope_incompatible'.

claim_boundary: A pass licenses only the exact low-fidelity model, dataset identities, mappings, sampled universe, operating envelope, semantics, and claim scope in the receipt.
